tagline: We're not just about keeping your swimming pool clean — we're dedicated to making it the highlight of your day!

hero.headline:
Nashville's Pool Pro Who Treats
It Like His Own
hero.subheadline: You bought your pool for backyard fun, not weekend chores. Hunter and the Just Poolin' crew handle every detail — cleaning, chemistry, equipment — so you can skip the work and jump straight in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool & Spa Care<br class="hidden md:block"> for Nashville Homeowners
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to green pool rescues, we handle it all so your backyard stays ready for fun — not a science project.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: Thorough cleaning, water chemistry balancing, equipment inspection, and adjustments every week. Your pool stays swim-ready without you lifting a finger.

cards.title: Hot Tub Maintenance
cards.description: Professional hot tub cleaning and water care to keep your spa crystal clear, safe, and always ready for a relaxing soak after a long day.

cards.title: Green Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Pool turned swamp-green? We eliminate algae, rebalance your chemistry, and restore sparkling water — usually within 48 to 72 hours.

cards.title: Pool Opening
cards.description: Seasonal startup including cover removal, water chemistry balancing, and full equipment inspection so your pool is swim-ready on day one.

cards.title: Pool Closing
cards.description: Complete winterization with thorough cleaning, chemical treatment, equipment prep, and secure cover installation to protect your investment all off-season.

cards.title: Airbnb Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Reliable pool care for short-term rental properties. Your guests always walk into a clean, inviting pool — and your reviews stay five-star.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Tell Us About Your Pool
steps.description: Give us a few details about your pool or hot tub. Hunter will personally reach out with an honest, no-pressure quote — usually within 24 hours.

steps.title: We Take It From Here
steps.description: Hunter and the crew show up on schedule and handle everything — skimming, vacuuming, chemistry, equipment checks. You don't have to think about it.

steps.title: Just Dive In
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready, week after week. If something ever isn't right, we come back and fix it — that's our promise.

about.label: Why Nashville Trusts Just Poolin'
about.headline: Not Just a Pool Guy — Your Dedicated Pool Care Partner
about.description: Founded by Hunter in 2024, Just Poolin' was built on a simple belief: every Nashville pool deserves the same care the owner would give it — if they had the time and know-how. We serve Belle Meade, Green Hills, East Nashville, Brentwood, Franklin, and surrounding communities with certified, hands-on service that goes beyond the basics.

features.title: Owner-Operated, Every Visit
features.description: Hunter personally services your pool. No random techs, no surprises — just the same trusted pro every single week.

features.title: No Contracts. Cancel Anytime.
features.description: We earn your business every visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees, no fine print. Stay because you want to.

features.title: Airbnb & Rental Specialists
features.description: We keep rental property pools guest-ready at all times. Clean water, happy guests, five-star reviews — that's the Just Poolin' effect.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Pick the plan that fits your pool. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — no contracts, no hidden fees.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% happy with any service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right — completely free. Hunter treats every pool like his own, and that means never leaving until the job is done right.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients in the Nashville area are on our schedule within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies, we offer same-day or next-day response. Just call Hunter directly and we'll work with your timeline.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all! Most clients give us gate access and we handle everything while you're at work or out enjoying your day. You'll get an update after each visit so you always know what was done.

faqs.question: Do you service Airbnb and rental properties?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We specialize in short-term rental pool maintenance across Nashville. We keep your pool guest-ready at all times so your reviews stay five-star and your guests keep coming back.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We proudly serve Belle Meade, Green Hills, East Nashville, West Meade, Sylvan Park, Franklin, Brentwood, Mount Juliet, Forest Hills, and surrounding Nashville communities.

faqs.question: What if I want to cancel?
faqs.answer: Cancel anytime with zero fees. No contracts, no cancellation penalties, no hassle. We believe in earning your trust every single visit — if we're not delivering, you're free to go.

testimonials.name: Maranda H.
testimonials.text: Hunter is a very professional hard working young man. He's always open to my ideas and questions about our pool. Couldn't be happier with the service!

testimonials.name: Nashville Homeowner
testimonials.text: Would highly recommend Just Poolin'. Hunter has done a great job servicing our pool and treated it like his own! Reliable, professional, and fair pricing.

testimonials.name: Brentwood Client
testimonials.text: Finding reliable pool service in Nashville is tough, but Just Poolin' nailed it from day one. Hunter is punctual, thorough, and genuinely cares about doing great work.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool That
Stays Swim-Ready?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure quote from Hunter himself. No contracts, no commitments — just honest Nashville pool care you can count on.
benefits: Free pool inspection with every quote

footer.description: Owner-operated pool service proudly serving Nashville and surrounding communities since 2024.
